mapper.sql: object_id, `usage`, owner_service, owner_domain, owner_type, owner_id, visibility, status, current_version_id, latest_file_name, latest_content_type, latest_content_length, latest_checksum_sha256, created_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into oss_object () values (#{objectId,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{usage}, #{ownerService}, #{ownerDomain}, #{ownerType}, #{ownerId}, #{visibility}, #{status}, #{currentVersionId,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{latestFileName}, #{latestContentType}, #{latestContentLength}, #{latestChecksumSha256}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) on duplicate key update `usage` = values(`usage`), owner_service = values(owner_service), owner_domain = values(owner_domain), owner_type = values(owner_type), owner_id = values(owner_id), visibility = values(visibility), status = values(status), current_version_id = values(current_version_id), latest_file_name = values(latest_file_name), latest_content_type = values(latest_content_type), latest_content_length = values(latest_content_length), latest_checksum_sha256 = values(latest_checksum_sha256), updated_at = values(updated_at)
